sentence: Your privacy is very important to us. Accordingly, we have developed this Policy in order for you to understand how we collect, use, communicate and disclose and make use of personal information. The following outlines our privacy policy:
We are committed to conducting our business in accordance with these principles in order to ensure that the confidentiality of personal information is protected and maintained.

section: H2:«In Sight» apps (Android) by AppsFab AS
sentence: These apps display on the camera screen places nearby by using augmented reality.The apps need the following permissions for these reasons:

section: H2:«In Sight» apps (Android) by AppsFab AS
sentence: We need to find your GPS location to show places nearby. We do not store or retrieve this information in any way.

section: H2:«In Sight» apps (Android) by AppsFab AS > H3:License check for Google Play / Phone state / identity and unit ID
sentence: The apps use the license check software provided by Google Play. The license check need the phone state, phone Identity and unit ID to make sure you are the rightful owner of the app. The license check software provided by Google Play use this information in a secure way to protect your privacy.

section: H2:«In Sight» apps (Android) by AppsFab AS > H3:Read content on USB storage / change or delete content on USB-storage
sentence: The app needs access to the USB storage to store pictures taken by the app and to later on read the pictures and add as attachments to e-mails etc. The user can decide within the app to send a picture taken by the app to other apps (like the e-mail app) and user action is required to allow this. We do not get access to or retrieve this information.

section: H2:«In Sight» apps (Android) by AppsFab AS > H3:Read content on USB storage / change or delete content on USB-storage
sentence: We need access to the camera to take pictures. We mix augmented text of places nearby on the picture taken and store the picture on the device. We do not get access to or retrieve this information.

section: H2:«In Sight» apps (Android) by AppsFab AS > H3:Internett and wifi access
sentence: The apps need internet or wifi access to send the picture taken by the app by e-email etc. and to show places nearby on the map. The user can decide within the app to send a picture taken by the app to other apps (like the e-mail app) and user action is required to allow this. We do not get access to or retrieve this information.
